theme: Initial Domain Modeling and JPA Setup

sessions.description: Set up core entities for the D&D Shop domain

goals: Start implementation of the selected portfolio project
decisionsMade: Used enums for stable domain values (roles, statuses, transaction types)
challenges: Setting up the database without pgAdmin made relationships harder to visualize
solutions: Focused on keeping entity relationships simple during initial setup
reflection: Enums work well for fixed domain values. However, roles may later be better stored in the database or externalized in configuration for improved flexibility.
